title: rubus lichuanensis
intro: Rubus lichuanensis, also known as Lichuan Raspberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus lichuanensis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and protecting against cardiovascular diseases. Rubus lichuanensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
